verdict: A comfortable and mostly well-flowing Easy chart, but it suffers from a few awkward offbeat placements and an overly sparse outro that will trip up beginners.

issues.problem: The hold starts on an offbeat eighth note (Beat 58.5) with no immediate anchor step beforehand, making it very difficult for an Easy-level player to time correctly.
An isolated offbeat eighth note is placed in the middle of a very slow, sparse outro. This is highly counter-intuitive for beginners who rely on strong downbeats.
The chart's density drops too drastically here, leaving massive 3-second gaps between steps which makes the ending feel disengaging.
